raw_consumer_statement: Billed on XX/XX/XXXX for {$79.00} from " XXXX '', a form of XXXX  insurance which was supposed to be a XXXX TIME only charge from back in XX/XX/XXXX. They charged me again in XXXX XXXX without consent. Filed a dispute with American Express, which was decided in XXXX 's favor. Wrote directly to XXXX twice complaining about this, only to receive " canned '' emails back stating it will take them XXXX to do anything. Not acceptable.
